svg.title: Rotation: axis, angle, and right-hand rule
svg.desc: Interactive diagram illustrating the three core concepts of rotation from Chapter 2: the fixed center, the axis of rotation, the arc of angular displacement, and the right-hand rule for direction.
svg.text: 2. Axis & angle define the rotation completely
3. Right-hand rule — direction of positive rotation
Hathaway, A Primer of Quaternions — Ch. 2: Rotations & Planes of Rotation
